# fresh-squeezy

> Skip the boilerplate. Auto-discover stores and products, generate checkouts, handle webhooks — one function call, full TypeScript, backed by automated API monitoring.

## What it is

fresh-squeezy is a plug-and-play billing layer for Lemon Squeezy. Pass your API key, define 4 callbacks, get a fully-wired billing backend. Ships with an interactive CLI wizard that auto-discovers your products and generates ready-to-run config files.

## Install

npm install fresh-squeezy @lemonsqueezy/lemonsqueezy.js

## Quick start

```typescript
import { createBilling } from "fresh-squeezy";

const billing = await createBilling({
  apiKey: process.env.LS_API_KEY,
  webhookSecret: process.env.LS_WEBHOOK_SECRET,
  skipTestEvents: true,   // ignore test-mode webhooks in production
  callbacks: {
    onOrder: async (event, method, meta) => {
      // method: 'purchase' | 'refund'
      // meta: { isTest: boolean, eventId: string }
      if (method === "purchase") await db.grantAccess(event.userId);
      if (method === "refund")   await db.revokeAccess(event.userId);
    },
    onSubscription: async (event, method, meta) => {
      // method: 'created'|'updated'|'cancelled'|'expired'|'paused'|'resumed'
      //       | 'payment_success'|'payment_recovered'|'payment_failed'
      if (method === "created")         await db.startSubscription(event.userId);
      if (method === "cancelled")       await db.cancelSubscription(event.userId);
      if (method === "payment_failed")  await notify.sendPaymentFailed(event.email);
    },
    onLicenseKey: async (event, method, meta) => {
      // method: 'created' | 'updated'
      if (method === "created") await db.storeLicense(event.userId, event.key);
    },
  },
});

// Checkout
const url = await billing.createCheckout({ variantId: "123", email: "user@example.com", userId: "user_1" });

// Webhook (Express)
app.post("/webhook", express.raw({ type: "application/json" }), async (req, res) => {
  if (!billing.verifyWebhook(req.body.toString(), req.headers["x-signature"] as string))
    return res.sendStatus(401);
  await billing.handleWebhook(JSON.parse(req.body.toString()));
  res.json({ ok: true });
});
```

## Callbacks

4 callbacks, all with the same `(event, method, meta)` pattern:

- `onOrder(event, method, meta)` — required. method: `'purchase' | 'refund'`
- `onSubscription?(event, method, meta)` — optional. method: `'created'|'updated'|'cancelled'|'expired'|'paused'|'resumed'|'payment_success'|'payment_recovered'|'payment_failed'`
- `onLicenseKey?(event, method, meta)` — optional. method: `'created' | 'updated'`
- `onWebhook?(eventType, event, meta)` — optional catch-all

`meta` always contains `{ isTest: boolean, eventId: string }`.

## BillingConfig fields

- `apiKey` — Lemon Squeezy API key
- `webhookSecret` — webhook signing secret
- `storeId?` — restrict to specific store
- `skipTestEvents?` — if true, test-mode webhooks are no-ops (default: false)
- `callbacks` — BillingCallbacks object
- `cachePath?` — path to JSON cache file for customer lookups
- `cacheTtlMs?` — cache TTL in milliseconds
- `logger?` — `{ filePath }` or `{ custom: BillingLogger }`
- `dedup?` — `{ backend?, ttlMs? }` deduplication config

## Management API (all on the billing object)

### Core
- `billing.stores` — StoreInfo[]
- `billing.plans` — Plan[]
- `billing.createCheckout(params)` → URL string
- `billing.verifyWebhook(rawBody, signature)` → boolean
- `billing.handleWebhook(payload)` → dispatches to callbacks
- `billing.refreshPlans()` — refresh cached plans
- `billing.getCustomerPortal(customerId)` → portal URL
- `billing.getExpressRouter(options)` — Express Router
- `billing.healthCheck()` → HealthCheckResult

### Stores & Auth
- `getStore(storeId)`, `listStores()`, `getAuthenticatedUser()`

### Subscriptions
- `getSubscription(id)`, `listSubscriptions(filter?)`
- `pauseSubscription(id)`, `resumeSubscription(id)`, `cancelSubscription(id)`, `changeSubscriptionVariant(id, variantId)`, `resumeCancelledSubscription(id)`
- `getSubscriptionInvoice(id)`, `listSubscriptionInvoices(filter?)`, `generateSubscriptionInvoice(id)`, `issueSubscriptionInvoiceRefund(id, amount)`
- `getSubscriptionItem(id)`, `listSubscriptionItems(subscriptionId?)`, `getSubscriptionItemCurrentUsage(id)`
- `createUsageRecord(subscriptionItemId, quantity, action?)`, `listUsageRecords(subscriptionItemId?)`

### Orders
- `getOrder(id)`, `listOrders(filter?)`, `generateOrderInvoice(id)`, `issueOrderRefund(id, amount)`
- `getOrderItem(id)`, `listOrderItems(filter?)`

### Customers
- `getCustomer(id)`, `getCustomerByEmail(email)`, `createCustomer(storeId, name, email)`
- `updateCustomer(id, params)`, `archiveCustomer(id)`, `getSubscriptionsForUser(userId)`

### Licenses
- `validateLicense(key)`, `getLicenseDetails(key)`, `activateLicense(key, instanceName?)`, `deactivateLicense(key, instanceId)`
- `listLicenseKeys(filter?)`, `getLicenseKeyInstance(id)`, `listLicenseKeyInstances(licenseKeyId?)`, `updateLicenseKey(id, params)`

### Webhooks
- `listWebhooks()`, `getWebhook(id)`, `createWebhook(url, events, secret?)`, `updateWebhook(id, url?, events?)`, `deleteWebhook(id)`

### Catalog
- `getProduct(id)`, `listProducts(storeId?)`, `getVariant(id)`, `listVariants(productId?)`
- `getPrice(id)`, `listPrices(variantId?)`, `getFile(id)`, `listFiles(variantId?)`

### Discounts
- `createDiscount(storeId, params)`, `deleteDiscount(id)`, `getDiscount(id)`, `listDiscounts(storeId?)`
- `getDiscountRedemption(id)`, `listDiscountRedemptions(discountId?)`

### Checkouts
- `createCheckout(params)`, `getCheckout(id)`, `listCheckouts(storeId?, variantId?)`

## Setup wizard

```bash
npx fresh-squeezy wizard
```

Auto-discovers stores and products using your API key, generates `.billing/billing-config.ts` and `.billing/example.ts`. Previous answers cached to `.billing/wizard-cache.json`.

## Package

npm: fresh-squeezy
GitHub: https://github.com/YosefHayim/fresh-squeezy
License: MIT
Node: >= 18
